notes: Empty folders now shown in tree and report, output folder setting no longer resets
changelog: Fixed: empty folders (and folders listed only as directory entries in the PC-3000 CSV) were completely missing from both the live folder-structure preview and the exported report, at any nesting depth
Fixed: the saved report location (fixed output folder) reset back to default every time the app started, regardless of what was previously chosen
Fixed: a small number of files appearing directly in a folder could show up as fake sub-folders in the structure preview
